overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character walking along a muddy ranch path. The character passes wooden fences and a horse corral before a horse-drawn carriage passes by, set against dramatic overcast storm clouds.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy ranch path flanked by wooden fences, heading toward distant farm buildings. The overcast sky creates a moody atmosphere with mountains visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a horse corral containing several horses grazing behind the wooden fence. The ranch buildings on the left become more prominent as the character progresses along the muddy path.

segments.scene_description: Having passed the corral, the character continues along the open ranch road as a horse-drawn carriage overtakes from behind and moves ahead down the muddy path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a muddy ranch path that transitions from a secluded walk past farm fences to an open road shared with passing traffic. It begins with the character walking between wooden fences toward distant farm buildings under a moody, overcast sky with mountains looming in the background. As the character progresses, the path leads alongside a horse corral where several horses graze, while the ranch buildings on the left grow more prominent in the frame. The scene then opens up as the character moves past the corral and continues down the muddy road, before a horse-drawn carriage overtakes them from behind and pulls ahead into the distance.
